items.title: Cronus Server Migration
items.content_html:
Cronus Server Migration

On Wednesday, March 18th beginning at 9:00 AM, SSCS will conduct a migration of the Cronus server to a new compute environment offering more memory, faster processors, and additional resources. Maintenance is expected to conclude before 5:00 PM.

items.title: Scheduled Network Maintenance
items.content_html:
Scheduled Network Maintenance

On Thursday, May 14th beginning at 6:00 AM CT, the Cluster will undergo scheduled network maintenance. The maintenance window is expected to conclude by 8:30 AM CT.
